_comment: One-off per-slug score adjustments that don't fit the volunteer pattern in event.config.json. Each entry adds 'delta' (signed int) to the project's total and shows a loud banner with the 'label' + 'reason' on the public scoreboard. Volunteer adjustments live in event.config.json → volunteers — use this file only for cases that need a custom reason (e.g. judge CoI, individual situations). Entries here override the volunteers block when slugs collide.
